title: Virginia Passes Gerrymandered Map to Help Democrats in Midterms: 4 Takeaways
summary: Virginia’s approval of an aggressive gerrymander could give Democrats up to four additional House seats as they seek to win back Congress.

title: Here’s What the New Virginia House Map Looks Like
summary: Democrats now hold six of the state’s 11 seats in the U.S. House, but the new map could allow the party to win 10 of them.

title: Here’s Where the National Fight Over Gerrymandered Maps Stands
summary: With Virginia’s vote on Tuesday, Democrats pulled close to even with Republicans, who may have further cards to play in the race to gain extra House seats.

title: Dave Mason, Songwriter Who Co-Founded Traffic, Dies at 79
